riskFloorReasons: new capability: new exported class / subsystem added

causalAutopsy.notes: The prior mutual-SSH phase proved restricted transport but intentionally stopped before standing OS SSH access, leaving autonomous peer execution incomplete.

guardEvidence.howCaught: Per-machine authorization mutations are event-driven and idempotent; repair attempts are capped by the existing ten-machine sweep and bounded repair breaker, while startup, disable, rotation, and revocation settle by removing managed entries.
